result.stdout:
USAGE: fsharplint [--help] [--format <formatArg>] [--version]
                  [<subcommand> [<options>]]

SUBCOMMANDS:

    lint <lintArgs>       Runs FSharpLint against a file or a collection of
                          files.

    Use 'fsharplint <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

    --format, -f <formatArg>
                          Output format of the linter.
    --version             Prints current version.
    --help                display this list of options.

result.stdout:
USAGE: fsharplint lint [--help] [--lint-config <lintConfig>]
                       [--file-type <project|solution|file|source|wildcard>]
                       <target>

TARGET:

    <target>              Input to lint.

OPTIONS:

    --lint-config, -l <lintConfig>
                          Path to the config for the lint.
    --file-type <project|solution|file|source|wildcard>
                          Input type the linter will run against. If this is
                          not set, the file type will be inferred from the file
                          extension.
    --help                display this list of options.

commands.payload:
USAGE: fsharplint lint [--help] [--lint-config <lintConfig>]
                       [--file-type <project|solution|file|source|wildcard>]
                       <target>

TARGET:

    <target>              Input to lint.

OPTIONS:

    --lint-config, -l <lintConfig>
                          Path to the config for the lint.
    --file-type <project|solution|file|source|wildcard>
                          Input type the linter will run against. If this is
                          not set, the file type will be inferred from the file
                          extension.
    --help                display this list of options.
